overview: MR.SONIC FF is a professional Free Fire tournament platform PWA with custom authentication, wallet management, match scheduling, admin controls, VIP tiers, gamification, real-time messaging, and 150+ features designed for competitive esports players.
features: Real-time match scheduling with room ID reveal
Wallet system with deposits, withdrawals, and coin conversion
Daily missions, battle pass, and gamification
Push notifications via Firebase Cloud Messaging
Tournament arena with bracket and countdown
Clan system, PvP challenges, and social features
